PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-10-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 04, 2012 is admitted to probate. Charles Cheever is appointed as the Executor/Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 22, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Karen Ann Simons is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen Murphy: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Puliego: Not reported.
